rulings.Case Title: JESSIE STREET COLLECTIVE, LLC VS. STANLEY CHIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defts Stanley Chia And Elizabeth Wu'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 28, 2017, Line 1. Defendants Stanley Chia And Elizabeth Wu's Demurrer To Complaint. Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is continued to December 21, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies must be delivered to department 501 no later than December 1, 2017 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. =(501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ANNIE LEE VS. ELENA LAUCHUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 28, 2017, Line 2. PLAINTIFF ANNIE LEE'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation. Hearing Required. Plaintiff and Defendant to be present. Plaintiff shall provide a copy of November 2017 water bill no later than 9:00 a.m. on November 28, 2017. =(501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN BRADY VS. JONATHAN MOORE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtnto Vacate Judgmnt And Recall Writ Of Possession
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 28, 2017, Line 3. DEFENDANTS JONATHAN MOORE, AARON SMITH, PAUL WALKER'S Motion to Vacate Judgmnt And Recall Writ Of Possession. DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain their burden. =(501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: NEW BERNAL HEIGHTS INC VS. SEAN KILLEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 28, 2017, Line 4. DEFENDANTS SEAN KILLEN, JOSEPH NOBLE'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default And Default Judgment. OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. =(501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: BANCAL MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. JOHN JACKSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 28, 2017, Line 5. DEFENDANT JOHN JACKSON'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain his burden under CCP 473.5 and Evid. Code 647. =(501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: QING LIN VS. PETER SARGENT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 28, 2017, Line 6. DEFENDANT PETER SARGENT'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. DENIED, 5 days to answer. =(501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: QING LIN VS. PETER SARGENT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 28, 2017, Line 6. PLAINTIFF QING LIN'S MOTION FOR IMPOSITION OF SANCTIONS. DENIED. =(501/LOT)
